text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As I'm watching a race from the stands...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And there you have it, folks! With elegance and
class, Fine Motion triumphantly finishes in first
place!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Phew! That was fun! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, Dober! Wow, you came to watch my race?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Fine. Well done out there. Congratulations
on winning!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thanks! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You were so fast and... so beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Really? I don't know what kind of face I was
making, but I had a wonderful time!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Fine, you were amazing out there! You were
so fast!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: You run so beautifully! I was so moved!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wow! Thanks so much! It looks like you all
enjoyed the race too!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: It's an odd sensation, seeing people have fun watching me have fun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You inspire people with your running. Your agility
and your perfect form...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It's as if we're looking at a work of art. I was
completely taken by you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, stop! That can't be true!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But... I can see my running has left a mark on
people's hearts.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I can't pretend it was intentional, but I'm really
glad to hear this race will be a happy memory for
them. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. What a confidence boost! I think my
concert is going to turn out well, too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'll be watching! You better put on an exciting
show, you hear?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely! I'll get you just as excited as I do in
my races! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Almost time to start. I need to open with a
greeting...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hello everyone! Thank you for all your support!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I'll never be able to forget today's race.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
To finish off such a memorable day, let me
express my gratitude to you all with a song! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, that's perfect! It's showtime!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hello everyone! Thank you for all your support!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
To express my gratitude, I'll show you my
finishing pose...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Just kidding! Here's a song! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: All right! That's perfect! It's showtime!
